sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ جُزْءًا أَسَاسِيًّا مِنْ حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni su postali osnovni dio našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones have become an essential part of our daily life.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ النَّاسُ هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةَ لِلتَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi koriste ove uređaje za komunikaciju s prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: People use these devices to communicate with friends and family.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا نَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ نَقْرَأَ الْأَخْبَارَ وَنَلْعَبَ الْأَلْعَابَ الْمُفِيدَةَ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Također možemo lako čitati vijesti i igrati korisne igrice.
sentences.translationEn: We can also read the news and play useful games easily.
